frs.title: Customer viewing opt-out and retroactive anonymization
Push notifications to customers for same events as FR107
Push notifications to shopkeepers for low-stock/PMLA/new-booking/review/overdue
Broadcast WhatsApp to filtered customer segments
Customer opt-in/out of marketing vs transactional notifications
Outbound messaging events logged per tenant for audit and quota tracking
Inventory aging and dead stock report
Export any report as CSV and PDF with shop branding
Global platform settings and compliance versioning
Per-tenant sitemap and Schema.org structured data
Configurable social links and WhatsApp click-to-chat
Referral codes and loyalty bonus logic
